message:
chore(beads): sync issue store with latest status transitions

Routine `br sync --flush-only` export. Small diff (6 insertions,
3 deletions) carrying legitimate bead state changes: a few tasks
moving from `open` → `in_progress` with assignees set, and matching
`updated_at` bumps. No beads added or removed; all IDs match across
the diff.
